evidence.scientific_clarity: All brief requirements met: pipeline nodes, solid data-flow arrows, dashed control/feedback arrow (diff→prior), and Retrieval/Generation rounded-rect groups are all present.
evidence.typography: Script never sets pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype=0; PDF embeds DejaVu Sans as Type 3 (confirmed via pdffonts), which is the matplotlib default the rubric explicitly flags.
evidence.palette: Green (#27AE60) used for output node and red (#C0392B) for Generation group background — red/green combination is problematic for deuteranopia/protanopia; otherwise blue/yellow/gray choices are distinguishable.
evidence.layout_density: Nodes span x=0.5–8.0 with two y-rows (1.2 and 3.0); xlim/ylim leave modest but not excessive whitespace; aspect='equal' keeps proportions clean; no label overlaps.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption accurately matches figure content and explains arrow conventions; legend placed lower-right; a reviewer would likely flag the red/green colorblind issue and missing pdf.fonttype=42.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF is genuine vector (no raster XObjects), but fonts are Type 3 not Type 42 — text glyphs are not selectable/editable TrueType; pdf.fonttype=42 is absent from the script.
evidence.file_format: All four required files present and non-trivial: figure.pdf (20 KB), figure.png (53 KB), caption.tex (625 B), gen_figure.py (6.4 KB); bonus figure.svg also generated.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption names every component and explains solid-vs-dashed arrow semantics and shaded subsystems; no numerical claim, but appropriate for a pure architecture diagram with no quantitative data.

overall_strengths: Complete pipeline diagram faithfully implements all brief requirements: correct node types, data-flow vs control arrows, and labeled group regions.
All required output files are present and non-trivial; caption is accurate and self-contained.
overall_weaknesses: pdf.fonttype=42 (and svg.fonttype=0) are never set, so the PDF embeds Type 3 DejaVu Sans — the default font the rubric explicitly prohibits — making text non-editable in Illustrator/Inkscape.
Red (#C0392B) for the Generation group and green (#27AE60) for the output node create a red-green pair that fails colorblind-safe discipline.
